commands.review_summary:
The PR clears `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` in the TUI session-switch and successful abort paths in `src/tui/tui-session-actions.ts`.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not run a live TUI repro. Current main can leave `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` true while `abortActive()` and `setSession()` clear the other run-state fields used by the busy guard.
commands.review_followup: Keep this PR in human review until the contributor adds real behavior proof and maintainers decide whether to require the focused regression test before merge.
